Game: Q bert 3 1992-10-01T00:00:00-07:00 Just when you thought it was safe to go hopping around on a pyramid...! Q*BERT 3 takes the classic Q*BERT arcade game theme to new heights, with an amazing variety of eye-popping, multi-screen worlds. You control Q*BERT as he tries to clear screen after screen while being chased by a wild bunch of crafty characters. You'll encounter the old familiar cast, hang with a whole universe of new enemies, obstacles and items. And in Q*BERT 3, Q*BERT's classic pyramid is only one of over 100 differently-shaped playfields, You'll find level after level of new and unique challenges! 2 3xu70dKl-zs <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/74dd3309-2e06-4a1c-b323-4147e21aec5a.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/60d493fc-2e48-418d-93d6-0eb6d10abfe6.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/a6fd611e-3a83-464e-a31b-a02d81724180.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/6cfce952-27c7-4605-a6d2-5ea77fb48de3.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/33096003-a948-4d03-81e1-ecdcb55c2749.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/0aa7e81f-b7d4-4bbd-93ee-4f2ac6272fa9.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/269c5606-2f3a-49be-b95b-c7128711aabf.png 2.5 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Q*bert#Q.2Abert_3 Not Rated Puzzle Realtime Associates NTVIC
